2010October 15, 2010

🇮🇹 Vico Equense (Naples), Italy

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Vico Equense, Italy, October 2010

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2010-10-vico-equense-italy

6 Resolutions

814Plenary
Return ISO 15926 Parts 9 and 10 to Stage 10.99 for recycling
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to request ISO CS to return ISO 15926 Part 9 and Part 10 to Stage 10.99.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
813Plenary
Manage ISO 29002 vocabulary as a database via Annex ST procedures
SC 4 resolves to manage the ISO 29002 vocabulary using the ISO Annex ST procedures for the management of standards as databases, as customized in the SC 4 standing document "Procedure for the maint...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to the Implementation Forum organizers, Paul van Exel and Anna Moreno, for their efforts in organizing the excellent event, speakers and venue.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to Anna Moreno, her family, and her team for their hosting and support of the 60th ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at the Oriente Hotel in Vico Equense, Italy. SC 4...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
